data.content: Planning complete. Root cause: three interrelated bugs — (1) checkPromptGuidance() in doctor.ts doesn't normalize legacy profile IDs like "beads-coarse-human-gated" before comparing against canonical expected profiles from listWorkflows(), (2) runDoctorFix append strategy creates duplicate guidance blocks instead of replacing, (3) PROMPT_KNOTS.md template is missing the FOOLERY_PROMPT_PROFILE line. Plan covers: normalize actualProfile using existing normalizeProfileId(), add "replace" fix strategy that strips old blocks before writing, add profile line to PROMPT_KNOTS.md, regression tests for all three paths. Medium complexity, 6 files changed.
